pub fn _mi_arenas_alloc(
    subproc: &mut crate::mi_subproc_t,
    size: usize,
    commit: bool,
    allow_large: bool,
    req_arena: Option<&crate::mi_arena_t>,
    tseq: usize,
    numa_node: i32,
    memid: &mut crate::MiMemid,
) -> Option<*mut std::ffi::c_void> {

    _mi_arenas_alloc_aligned(
        subproc,
        size,
        alignment,
        0,
        commit,
        allow_large,
        req_arena,
        tseq,
        numa_node,
        memid,
    )
}
